headline: Kroger (KR) Faces Escalating Cage Free Egg Campaign At Harris Teeter
summary: The Humane League has escalated a national campaign urging Kroger's Harris Teeter chain to commit to a fully cage free egg supply. Activists are calling for a detailed and public transition plan, highlighting animal welfare and supply chain transparency. The campaign comes as several grocery competitors have already set clearer cage free commitments. Kroger, listed as NYSE:KR, is facing fresh scrutiny as the debate over animal welfare standards intensifies around its Harris Teeter banner...

headline: Target, Walmart and Amazon among brands losing LGBTQ+ consumer spending, new survey says
